summary: Average show with a surprisingly good Touch encore; recording quality not discussed
review: The reviewer was initially underwhelmed by the concert but later discovered some highlights, most notably the Touch encore that stood out positively. No comments were made about the audio source or mix, leaving the recording quality unknown.
